title: PerformFine++
description: All of OptiFine's features + many more!
body:
## This modpack has been discontinued in favour of [Boost Those Frames](https://modrinth.com/modpack/boost-those-frames), only use this modpack for 1.19.2–1.21 version.

### IMPORTANT: I am not affiliated nor endorsed by Sp614x, this modpack does **not** include OptiFine nor OptiFabric inside.



Have you ever wanted **all** the features of OptiFine on Fabric or Quilt but even better performance? If yes, then this modpack is your go to for your OptiFine _and_ performance needs + much, much more!

This modpack offers all of OptiFine's features, including:
1. **Boosted Performance:** OptiFine offers better fps than the vanilla game, but is limited and outdated compared to its new counterpart, _sodium_.

2. **Shader Support:** OptiFine is widely known for its support of shaders and is a must when making a modpack mimicking its features.

3. **Custom Entity Models:** This feature offers the ability to use custom entity models like Fresh Animations, being used in many resource packs.

4. **Zoom:** OptiFine has a special zoom feature which is used by many players, and is necessary to mimic in this modpack. (Note: if zoom doesn't work by clicking C, head over to controls and keybinds, select show conflicts and change the "Save Hotbar Activator" to something else, this is my mistake sorry).

5. **OptiFine Capes:** OptiFine capes let you use any cape of your choice, thus allowing for more player customisability. 

Also I have added many new Quality Of Life mods!

- **In- game resourcepack and shaderpack manager**
- **New Player Animations**
- **Improved and customisable F3 menu**
- **Distant Horizons!** (Off by default)
- **Customisable Discord Rich Presence**
- **Controller Support!**
- **Fullbright Toggle** (G by default)
- **Extra Hunger bar info**

Not to mention all these mods are completely client side so you can use it on any server!

So what are you waiting for? Get this modpack and improve your frames and make Minecraft enjoyable on your potato pc.
